summary: Iteration 4 fully validated. Backend: 28/28 pytest tests PASSED (added 9 new tests for shortlist auto-generation, admin regenerate endpoint auth+404+success, newsletter subscribe valid/dupe/invalid/missing). Frontend: All new static pages (/about /contact /careers /privacy /terms /cookies) render with [data-testid=static-page] and correct titles; all 6 footer link data-testids navigate correctly; social icons (linkedin/twitter/email) present; newsletter form submits and shows success toast; admin dashboard Enterprise Leads tab shows [data-testid=row-ent-expand-{id}] expander, [data-testid=ent-shortlist-{id}] Match button, and detail row [data-testid=row-ent-detail-{id}] with project brief + AI shortlist rendering name/tier/fit_reason. Confirmed end-to-end: a public enterprise intake POST with a BFSI/fraud-detection/RAG brief produces a real Claude-Sonnet-4.6 shortlist of 2 approved providers with correct fit reasons, and the admin Match button re-triggers regeneration ('Shortlist regenerated' toast).
passed: POST /api/enterprise/intake returns `shortlist: []` shape as list; populated 2 matches when approved providers exist
POST /api/enterprise/intake/{id}/shortlist with admin Bearer returns 200 with updated EnterpriseIntake
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe same email twice is idempotent (both 200, no duplicate insert)
Existing auth/protection regressions: /api/admin/stats requires Bearer, /auth/login+me still work
All 6 static pages load with [data-testid=static-page] and matching h1: About NeuralAtlas / Contact / Careers / Privacy Policy / Terms of Service / Cookie Policy
All 6 footer testids (footer-about/contact/careers/privacy/terms/cookies) click-navigate to correct routes
Social icon testids (social-linkedin, social-twitter, social-email) present in footer
Newsletter form: valid email submits -> success toast 'Subscribed. Curated AI briefs, once a month.' + input cleared
Newsletter invalid email: browser HTML5 email validation blocks submission (native tooltip 'Please include an @ ...')

Admin end-to-end: login OK -> /admin -> Enterprise Leads tab -> seeded lead row present with '2 MATCHES' badge -> expander opens detail row showing 'Project brief' + 'AI Shortlist' with #1, #2 provider name, elite tier, and Claude-authored fit_reason -> Match button click triggers regen -> 'Shortlist regenerated' toast
critical_code_review_comments: server.py `generate_shortlist` catches all exceptions and returns [] silently. This is graceful but hides malformed LLM JSON from operators. Consider persisting a `shortlist_error` field on the intake (or logging with a distinct code) so admin can distinguish 'no approved providers' from 'LLM failure' when the row shows 0 matches.

server.py still uses deprecated `@app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown')` and `asyncio.get_event_loop().run_in_executor(...)` — carried over from iter 3. Non-blocking but generates DeprecationWarning on Py 3.11+.

NewsletterForm.jsx client-side guard uses `email.includes('@')` — trivially defeatable (e.g., 'a@'). Server does full EmailStr validation and returns 422 (verified). Consider tightening client regex or relying purely on the input `type=email` (which is what actually blocked the invalid submit in the UI test).

AdminDashboard.jsx is now 320 lines with an expanding, per-row detail render that duplicates a small provider-status filter (`providers.filter(p => p.status === 'approved')`) on every row render. Cheap for current dataset but worth memoising as the enterprises list grows.

Backend `/api/newsletter/subscribe` is NOT authenticated (correct — it must be public) but there is no rate-limit / per-IP throttle. A hostile client could flood `db.newsletter_subscribers` with distinct emails. Consider adding a lightweight rate limit or captcha before launch.

Response of newsletter subscribe returns `{ok:true, email:'...'}`. Frontend only checks non-error, so this is fine, but the endpoint is not idempotent-visible: caller cannot tell 'first-time subscribe' from 'already-subscribed'. Non-blocking for MVP.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added TestShortlist and TestNewsletter classes — 9 new tests)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Shortlist_*, TEST_ShortlistPop_*, TEST_RegenAuth_*, TEST_Regen_*, TEST_UI_Shortlist_1784317364, plus newsletter emails test_news_*@example.com and test_news_ui_*@example.com. Test provider approvals may have promoted a TEST_Prov_* record to `approved` during TestShortlist.test_intake_shortlist_populated_when_approved_providers_exist (only if the DB had none approved — currently ~2 approved exist).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has an EMERGENT_LLM_KEY driving Claude Sonnet 4.6 via emergentintegrations. Generate_shortlist gracefully degrades: no approved providers -> [], no LLM key -> heuristic top-3, LLM/JSON error -> []. Frontend admin lead row exposes expanded detail via `expanded[id]` state map + Fragment-wrapped rows. Newsletter dedupes by lowercase email in `db.newsletter_subscribers`. Seeded lead id used during this run: 33698bfb-c76b-4c11-af53-e7d2e38b8df8 (`TEST_UI_Shortlist_1784317364`). Note: 401 console errors on public pages are AuthContext calling /auth/me on load — expected and non-blocking.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in iteration 4.
